name: chaos-duration
description: Set chaos duration (in sec) as desired

name: vmi-name
description: The VirtualMachineInstance name to target (if label selector not specified)

name: label-selector
description: VMI label selector used to target one or more VMIs by label
validation_message: Label selector must be in the format: key=value

name: namespace
description: Namespace where the target VMI is running

name: instance-count
description: Number of instances to target if more than one is selected by the LABEL_SELECTOR

name: execution
description: When multiple VMIs are selected the execution on all of them can be performed in parallel or serial

name: ingress
description: Incoming network traffic will be filtered

name: egress
description: Outgoing network traffic will be filtered

name: interfaces
short_description: Network interfaces to filter traffic (comma separated)
description: Network interfaces to filter traffic on (if more than one separated by comma eg. eth0,eth1,eth2)
validation_message: Network interfaces must be in the format: eth0 or a comma separated list eth0,eth1,eth2

name: ports
short_description: Network ports to filter traffic (comma separated)
description: Network ports to filter traffic on (if more than one separated by comma eg. 8080,8081,8082)
validation_message: Network ports must be in the format: 8080 or a comma separated list 8080,8081,8082

name: protocols
short_description: The network protocols that will be filtered
description: The network protocols that will be filtered (tcp, udp or both of them comma separated e.g. tcp,udp)
validation_message: The network protocol must be tcp or udp or both of them comma separated: tcp,udp

name: image
short_description: The network chaos injection workload container image
description: The network chaos injection workload container image

name: taints
short_description: The list of tolerations for the network filter workload
description: The list of tolerations that can be assigned to the network filter workload (comma separated)

name: service-account
short_description: The service account for the VMI network filter workload
description: The service account associated with the VMI Network Filter workload
